channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Park Known for Rare Gorillas Prepares to Fight Ebola and Protect Primates
item.description: Rangers in Virunga National Park are on the front lines, working to contain the virus amid rising conflict.

item.title: Despite Tough Market, Summer Jobs Offer Big Benefits for Teens
item.description: Teenagers face a competitive labor market, but the personal rewards of summer work are substantial.

item.title: Pope Leo states war with Iran does not meet 'just war' criteria
item.description: Pope Leo XIV told journalists that the conflict in Iran does not meet Catholic teaching's definition of a just war.

item.title: Israel reportedly used white phosphorus near Lebanese areas. What is it?
item.description: White phosphorus is legal under international law but can cause severe injuries and indiscriminate harm in populated areas.
